mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_code, bucket, oss_sp, endpoint_inner, endpoint_outer, region, access_key, default_flag, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM mdm_fs_bucket WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND bucket LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bucket}, '%') AND oss_sp = #{ossSp} AND endpoint_inner = #{endpointInner} AND endpoint_outer = #{endpointOuter} AND region = #{region} AND access_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{accessKey}, '%') AND default_flag = #{defaultFlag} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT tenant_code, bucket, oss_sp, default_flag FROM mdm_fs_bucket WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND oss_sp = #{ossSp} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
